title: Airmash Relay
description: Tap missile beats on incoming flight lanes, sync your squadron, and outscore ghost rivals in a 3-minute sky skirmish.

howToPlayJson.title: Airmash Relay
howToPlayJson.objective: Survive a 3-minute airmash round by tapping incoming missile markers on beat, preserving your combo, and building the highest score against cached multiplayer ghost scores.

controls.input: Tap a glowing missile marker as it reaches the strike ring
controls.outcome: Destroys the missile, adds score, and builds combo
Shifts focus to the next air lane for denser patterns

controls.input: Two-finger tap when the burst meter is full
controls.outcome: Clears one crowded wave and saves a combo drop

steps: Missiles enter from the horizon in 3 air lanes, each synced to the music beat.
Tap each missile exactly as it crosses the strike ring to score perfect, good, or miss timing.
Every 10 clean hits increases the combo multiplier and adds extra ghost traffic from rival pilots.
As the track intensifies, lanes speed up, fake syncopated decoys appear, and multi-missile chords demand rapid taps.
A miss, late tap, or 3 missiles reaching the city breaks the run; final score posts to the simple leaderboard.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Perfect hits grant 100 points, good hits grant 50, and the combo multiplier rises from 1x to 8x. Consecutive perfect bars fill a burst meter for bonus clears and end-of-run survival points.
tips: Watch the strike ring, not the missile spawn.
Swipe early before chorus sections add two-lane patterns.
Use burst clear to protect a high multiplier, not on easy waves.
Ghost rivals are score targets only, so the game stays fully offline-friendly after first load.
